message:
feat(core,btree,extensions,migrate): DESC index key ordering, virtual table transaction lifecycle, and migration concurrency safety

Teach BtCursor to respect per-column DESC flags during index binary
search via new compare_index_key_bytes() and compare_index_key_values()
methods that reverse comparison order when the corresponding flag is true.
Propagate key_sort_directions through IndexSchema and VDBE engine to all
four cursor construction sites, and validate DESC ordering during
PRAGMA integrity_check.

Add full transaction lifecycle (begin/sync/commit/rollback and nested
savepoints) to live virtual tables via a generic TransactionalVtabState<S>
helper with snapshot-based rollback. FTS5 and R-tree extensions implement
all seven transaction hooks using cloneable snapshots. Connection
coordinates lazy vtab enlistment with savepoint catch-up, pre-commit sync,
two-phase commit/rollback, and savepoint propagation across all
participating vtab instances.

Harden the migration runner against concurrent initializers by using
BEGIN IMMEDIATE for write serialization and re-checking the applied
version inside the write transaction to prevent double-apply races.
The runner now re-reads current_version after each migration instead
of relying on the applied list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
